237:43421.name: Button
237:43421.description:
ukg-button

Buttons are one-tap actions. They feature a range of weights to communicate their emphasis. They are configurable with parent and child icon options. Buttons can also have their primary icon, label, and secondary icon turned off to create different configurations.

2:9232.name: Avatar
2:9232.description:
.ukg-avatar

Avatars provide a consistent visual representation of a specific person.

2:9895.name: Divider
2:9895.description:
.ukg-divider

Dividers separate content areas from each other.

ukg-tab-bar 2﻿


Tabs organize groups of related content that are at the same level of hierarchy.

185:30871.name: .Tab none
185:30871.description:
ukg-tab
Tabs organize groups of related content that are at the same level of hierarchy. The ukg-tab must be contained in the ukg-tab-bar component in order to function.

203:23685.name: Modal
203:23685.description:
.ukg-modal

A modal is a child window which displays in front of the application's main window. Use the modal component to build custom modals.

componentProperties.value:
Our Blood Orange CBC gummies are made with real fruit and a Sativa enhanced botanical terpene blend, making them a great addition to a day out and about.
Whether eaten for a creative boost, or prepping for a dance party, you’ll be ready to go in no time.
